mapper.sql: from sys_school s join sys_dict_item d on d.id = s.category_dict_item_id and d.deleted = 0 left join sys_school_tag_rel rel on rel.school_id = s.id and rel.deleted = 0 left join sys_school_tag t on t.id = rel.tag_id and t.deleted = 0 where s.deleted = 0
mapper.select:
select count(*) from sys_school s join sys_dict_item d on d.id = s.category_dict_item_id and d.deleted = 0 where s.deleted = 0
and (s.school_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or d.dict_label like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

select s.id, s.school_name, s.category_dict_item_id, d.dict_label as category_label, group_concat(distinct t.tag_name order by t.tag_name separator '、') as tag_summary
group by s.id, s.school_name, s.category_dict_item_id, d.dict_label order by s.school_name

select s.id, s.school_name, s.category_dict_item_id, d.dict_label as category_label, group_concat(distinct t.tag_name order by t.tag_name separator '、') as tag_summary
and s.id = #{id} group by s.id, s.school_name, s.category_dict_item_id, d.dict_label limit 1

select s.id, s.school_name, s.category_dict_item_id, d.dict_label as category_label, group_concat(distinct t.tag_name order by t.tag_name separator '、') as tag_summary
and s.school_name = #{schoolName} group by s.id, s.school_name, s.category_dict_item_id, d.dict_label limit 1
select tag_id from sys_school_tag_rel where school_id = #{schoolId} and deleted = 0 order by id
mapper.insert: insert into sys_school (school_name, category_dict_item_id, deleted) values (#{schoolName}, #{categoryDictItemId}, 0)
mapper.update: update sys_school set deleted = 1 where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update sys_school_tag_rel set deleted = 1 where school_id = #{schoolId} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into sys_school_tag_rel (school_id, tag_id, deleted) values (#{schoolId}, #{tagId}, 0)
mapper.select: select count(*) from sys_school where category_dict_item_id = #{categoryDictItemId} and deleted = 0
select count(*) from youth_info where school_name = #{schoolName} and deleted = 0
